Oral Electronic Monitoring Release through OPTIONS is ordered by the Court. Defendant is ordered to adhere to the Court-ordered conditions of Electronic Monitoring. After Release on OR, the defendant shall be report to OPTIONS Electronic Monitoring Services and be placed on Electronic Monitoring Defendant shall be fitted with a GPS device and is ordered to comply with all terms of release as stated on the record and by OPTIONS. OPTIONS shall provide proof of enrollment and Electronic Monitoring placement to the San Francisco District Attorney's Office by email. OPTIONS shall notify the San Francisco District Attorney's Office about any violations of Electronic Monitoring. The Defendant agrees to appear at any and all court proceedings concerning Electronic Monitoring violations.
